title: trachydium obtusiusculum
intro: Trachydium obtusiusculum, also known as Chinese forked fern or forked fern, is a plant species belonging to the family Ophioglossaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Trachydium obtusiusculum has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, and is also believed to have anti-aging and immune-boosting properties. In herbal preparations, Trachydium obtusiusculum is typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to create formulas for treating various health conditions.
